/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libbinpack_loader.dylib -install_name @rpath/libbinpack_loader.dylib CMakeFiles/binpack_loader.dir/binpack_loader.cpp.o
